personal_info.name: Arun Gopi
personal_info.title: Healthcare RCM Leader & Data Analytics Specialist

summary: Strategic Healthcare Revenue Cycle (RCM) leader and data analytics specialist with 18+ years of experience, including 7+ years supporting US healthcare processes. Experienced in end-to-end RCM, including medical billing (UB-04, CMS-1500), coding (CPT, ICD-10, HCPCS), denial management using CARC and RARC codes, and AR follow-up. Focused on reducing AR aging, improving collections, and ensuring compliance with CMS guidelines and HIPAA regulations. Skilled in Power BI, Microsoft Fabric, SQL, and Python. Proven ability to reduce claim denials by 20% and improve operational efficiency by 25% through analytics and process improvements.

responsibilities: Managed full-cycle US healthcare RCM operations
Ensured compliance with CMS and HIPAA regulations
Analyzed claims data to identify denial trends
Developed 15+ Power BI dashboards for KPI tracking
Built automated ETL pipelines reducing manual reporting by 40%
Improved clean claim rate and first-pass resolution
Collaborated with clinical teams to improve documentation
Reduced training time by 30% through mentorship programs
Built KPI dashboards (AR Days, Denial Rate, Collection Rate)
Led team of 40+ improving SLA adherence
Developed escalation protocol improving response time by 40%

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate (DP-600)
achievements: Recovered $90K in underbilled revenue through claim audits
Resolved $104K in Medicaid claims reducing aged AR
Led QMS implementation aligned with ISO standards

projects.name: Healthcare RCM Analytics Platform
projects.description: Built centralized analytics solution integrating claims, payments, and AR datasets with real-time KPI tracking

projects.name: Power BI Embedded Healthcare Dashboard
projects.description: Developed dashboards for denial analysis, payer performance, and revenue trends
